response: To determine the total number of writing prompts Nurse Emily needs, we first calculate the number of groups. With 24 residents and 6 participants per group, there are 4 groups in total. Initially, she allocates 3 prompts to each of these 4 groups, which requires 12 prompts. Additionally, she has prepared 10 extra prompts to be shared equally among the groups. Adding the initial 12 prompts to the 10 extra prompts results in a total of 22 prompts needed for the session. Emily treats her collection of prompts like a well-organized library, ensuring every resident has access to a rich variety of topics. Just as a library offers resources to inspire many, her prompt library supports the creative journey of all participants. The END.
